description: The image captures a moment in a dark room, where three small lights punctuate the blackness. These lights are arranged in a straight line across the center of the image, with each one slightly offset from the others. The leftmost light is the brightest, casting a soft glow that gradually fades as it extends to the right. Each light has a blue tint, adding a touch of coolness to the scene. Despite the darkness, there's a sense of calm and tranquility emanating from this simple yet intriguing composition.
